Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On March 13, 2003
Off Calendar Mar-20-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris, Clerk: P. Dias, Reporter: Robert Balian, Bailiff: Henry. Rich Schoenberger, Esq. represented Plaintiff, Ranett Boyd. Also present, John W. Ranucci, Esq. and Jack C. Henning, Esq.,from Enterprise Rent-A-Car. The Court takes evidence, and good cause appearing, grants compromise as follows: Attorney Fees: $95,819.03, Costs: $16,723.89 and a structured settlement as set for in the petition. Order signed in open court.
